S.FORM: Tony Anthony kawas tay 1937, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Tony Anthony, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tonj antħonj kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, tonj antħonj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: tonj antħonj kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj **, tonj antħonj, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
